note: Per-metric ratchet for pnpm console:scan over packages/client/src. warnings = ungated chatty call sites; method.warn/method.error bound total warn/error sites (reserved for actionable conditions). info/total are deliberately unbounded so dev-gating a site (the preferred remediation) never fails the check. Lower a limit in the same change that gates or removes a batch; raise one only with justification in that commit.
